<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject; use PHPUnit\Framework\Constraint\Constraint; use PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\Rule\AnyInvokedCount; use PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\Runtime\PropertyHook; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This trait is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ trait Method { abstract public function __phpunit_getInvocationHandler(): InvocationHandler; public function method(Constraint|PropertyHook|string $constraint): InvocationStubber { return $this ->__phpunit_getInvocationHandler() ->expects(new AnyInvokedCount) ->method($constraint); } }
